offer: For property managers processing 10–50 rental units/month, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent roll report generation instead of manual compilation of reports using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent and delayed rent roll reporting
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try email notifications for reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
